title: Rich Jamaican Blackcurrant Jam Stir-fry
description: A rich and crisp jamaican dish featuring a dairy-free-friendly slow-cooked blackcurrant jam stir-fry, perfect for breakfast or snack time.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons soy sauce (or tamari for a gluten-free option)

instructions: Preheat your stovetop to medium heat.
In a large skillet, melt 1 tablespoon of coconut oil over medium heat. Add the chopped onions and garlic, cooking until translucent.
Add the blackcurrant jam into the skillet, stirring continuously for about 5 minutes until it starts forming clumps and thickens.
Stir in the kale leaves and soy sauce, reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for another 10 minutes or until most of the liquid has been absorbed by the kale.
Serve hot with gluten-free toast or as a side dish with any protein source.
